task: In what year did the city that hosted the first modern Olympic Games (1896) become the capital of its country?

steps.tool_input: city that hosted the first modern Olympic Games 1896
year Athens became the capital of Greece

notes: Multi-hop: Athens hosted the 1896 Olympics; it became the capital of modern Greece in 1834, replacing Nafplio. Tests chained historical lookup with potential temptation to return the wrong year (1896).
